content: If you explain everything in medical jargon, it's impossible that everyone understands immediately.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Dejo (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Se si spiega tutto in gergo medico, è impossibile che capiscano tutti immediatamente
